problem-framing 1 open comment
OverviewEvidenceHypothesesDecisionsExperimentReview
Act and learn

Experiment or increment

The next action is tied to an assumption and a decision rule.

experiment-001

Provide a manually assisted status lookup for ten requests or four weeks.

Critical assumption

A plain-language release-status response lets support answer without contacting an application developer.

Signals

  • Requests answered without an application developer
  • Time to answer
  • Cases where status is insufficient
Decision rule

Automate if at least seven of ten requests are answered without developer involvement and no material safety issue appears.

Tests problem-001
